name: Main Explore
description: Channel and topic discovery. A page-style NavigationBar tops a `tabs/underline` set ('Explore' / 'My Channels'); the body is shopping-shaped with two distinct horizontal rails — recommended channels (large preview cards with Follow toggle) and Hot Posts (post preview cards with embedded poll chips). A six-item TabBar pins the bottom with Explore active.

top.note: page variant — leading menu, centered title, trailing search + profile icons.

tabs.note: Sliding black underline indicator on the active tab.

cards.title: Frontend Engineering
cards.body: Daily posts on React, Vite, and tooling.

body.note: Two horizontal rails inside the body, each with its own section header. The 'Recommended for you' rail uses `button/toggle` on each card; the 'Hot Posts' rail trails a `button/text` 'Refresh' on the section header and shows `chip/tag` Poll markers inside cards. Body family is `feed` since both rails are content streams; cards are described in items[].cards for downstream renderers.

rules: Keep the two horizontal rails as separate sections with their own headers — they look similar but are semantically different (channels vs posts).
Follow/Unfollow uses `button/toggle` (both states are valid); do not split into two button variants.
Section trailing actions (e.g. 'Refresh') are `button/text`, not chips.
